/usr/sbin/cc -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tgbot_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tgbot_tests.dir/tests/main.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot_tests.dir/tests/test_storage.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot_tests.dir/tests/test_db.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot_tests.dir/tests/test_json.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot_tests.dir/tests/test_config.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot_tests.dir/tests/test_edge_cases.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot_tests.dir/third_party/cjson/cJSON.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot_tests.dir/src/storage.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot_tests.dir/src/db.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot_tests.dir/src/config.c.o -o tgbot_tests  /usr/lib64/libsqlite3.so
